content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Most performance, memory-usage, and ergonomics claims (benchmarks, 30% faster, 18% less CPU, 2–4× less RAM, 2× speedups, 2026 survey, specific case studies, tooling comparisons) are not supported by any evidence ledger item.", "fix": "Either add ledger items with quotes/URLs for each concrete benchmark and survey cited, or remove/soften those unsupported quantitative and tooling claims."}, {"problem": "The only ledger item is about Rust vs Go data races, but the report uses it to support broader claims (overall stronger safety, RAII, richer type system, fewer bugs, long-term maintainability) that go beyond what the quoted text actually states.", "fix": "Constrain the safety discussion to data-race and memory-safety differences explicitly mentioned in the ledger quote, or add new ledger items that substantiate the broader safety and maintainability claims."}]}
